calendar.matters:
Progress Report On Compliance With Ccp Section 1279.5(D) And Penal Code Section 290 Re: Submission Of Name Change To San Francisco Police Chief.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Leticia Perez, #7782.
Ben Lunine, Esq. appeared with Petitioner, La Floyd David Jones.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Lisa Angelina Jones.

Matter is continued to January 31, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for Progress Report on Compliance with CCP Section 1279.5(d) and Penal Code Section 290 re: Submission of Name Change to San Francisco Police Chief.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
